summary: Private Trading module (Phase 6) testing complete. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend fully functional - Pvt Trading tab visible, Paddy Purchase and Rice Sale sub-tabs working with existing test data. Payment dialogs functional. Party Ledger includes pvt_paddy and rice_buyer filter options.

pvt_trading_navigation.tab_visible: PASS - Pvt Trading tab visible in main navigation (data-testid='tab-private-trading')

paddy_purchase_section.existing_data: PASS - Ram Singh entry visible (49.45Q, Rs.108,790)
paddy_purchase_section.summary_cards: PASS - Shows Total Entries=1, Total Qntl=49.45Q, Total Amount=Rs.108,790, Paid=Rs.50,000, Balance=Rs.58,790
paddy_purchase_section.form_dialog: PASS - Opens with all required fields (date, party_name, truck_no, rst_no, agent_name, mandi_name, rate_per_qntl, kg, bag, g_deposite, plastic_bag, moisture, cutting_percent, disc_dust_poll)
paddy_purchase_section.payment_dialog: PASS - Payment dialog opens with amount, mode, reference fields (data-testid='paddy-pay-dialog')

rice_sale_section.existing_data: PASS - Shyam Traders entry visible (100Q Usna, Rs.350,000)
rice_sale_section.summary_cards: PASS - Shows Total Entries=1, Total Qntl=100Q, Total Amount=Rs.350,000, Received=Rs.200,000, Balance=Rs.150,000
rice_sale_section.form_dialog: PASS - Rice Sale form has date, party_name, rice_type, quantity_qntl, rate_per_qntl, bags, truck_no fields

api_endpoints.GET_private_paddy: PASS - Returns paddy purchases list with auto-calculated fields
api_endpoints.GET_private_paddy_filters: PASS - Filters by kms_year, season work
api_endpoints.POST_private_paddy: PASS - Creates new paddy purchase with auto-calculations (qntl, gbw_cut, mill_w, moisture_cut, cutting, final_w, total_amount, balance)
api_endpoints.POST_rice_sales: PASS - Creates rice sale with total_amount and balance
api_endpoints.PUT_rice_sales: PASS - Updates entry and recalculates balance
api_endpoints.POST_private_payments_paddy: PASS - Creates payment and updates paddy entry paid_amount
api_endpoints.POST_private_payments_rice: PASS - Creates payment and updates rice sale paid_amount
api_endpoints.DELETE_private_payments: PASS - Deletes payment and reverses balance on referenced entry
api_endpoints.party_ledger_pvt_paddy: PASS - GET /api/reports/party-ledger?party_type=pvt_paddy returns Pvt Paddy entries
api_endpoints.party_ledger_rice_buyer: PASS - GET /api/reports/party-ledger?party_type=rice_buyer returns Rice Buyer entries

party_ledger_integration.pvt_paddy_option: PASS - Pvt Paddy option visible in Party Type dropdown
party_ledger_integration.rice_buyer_option: PASS - Rice Buyer option visible in Party Type dropdown
party_ledger_integration.entries_display: PASS - Ram Singh (Pvt Paddy) and Shyam Traders (Rice Buyer) entries shown in ledger

seed_data_verified.paddy_purchase: Ram Singh - 49.45Q @ Rs.2200/Q = Rs.108,790 (Paid: Rs.50,000, Balance: Rs.58,790)
seed_data_verified.rice_sale: Shyam Traders - 100Q Usna @ Rs.3500/Q = Rs.350,000 (Received: Rs.200,000, Balance: Rs.150,000)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 Private Trading module fully tested. Pvt Trading tab is visible in navigation bar after Ledgers. Has two sub-tabs: Paddy Purchase (धान खरीदी) and Rice Sale (चावल बिक्री). Auto-calculations work for paddy entries. Payment dialogs functional for both. Party Ledger updated with Pvt Paddy and Rice Buyer filter options. Previous: iteration_17 tested Phase 5 Ledgers.
